completed_tasks.name: BUG-R1 — RIS always cold_start_stale
completed_tasks.details: ris._current_git_head changed from rev-parse HEAD (full 40-char SHA) to rev-parse --short HEAD (7-char). cli.py stored short SHA; ris.py compared full SHA → always stale. Now both sides use short SHA → cold_start_ready works.

completed_tasks.name: BUG-D1 — cache_app not registered in CLI
completed_tasks.details: Added cache_app Typer sub-group + status/clear/warm commands. Registered with app.add_typer(cache_app, name='cache'). Added 'cache' to _SUBCOMMANDS frozenset (was being consumed as repo path by _preprocess_args, routing to main app instead of cache sub-app).

completed_tasks.name: BUG-D2 — version bump invalidates ALL cache
completed_tasks.details: Added ANALYZER_CACHE_VERSION='1' to cache.py. Replaced f'v={_sc_version},' in core_flags_str with f'acv={_cache_mod.ANALYZER_CACHE_VERSION},'. Patch releases no longer wipe L1 cores. ANALYZER_CACHE_VERSION only bumped when analysis logic/schema changes. One-time migration wipe occurs when upgrading from 1.32.4 → 1.32.5 (unavoidable).

completed_tasks.name: BUG-C5 — CAS blobs non-atomic writes
completed_tasks.details: _cas_store_blob now uses _atomic_write(path, gzip.compress(raw)) instead of path.write_bytes(). Prevents partial blobs visible to concurrent readers on interrupted write.

completed_tasks.name: BUG-C4 — GC size budget excludes CAS blobs
completed_tasks.details: GC pass-3 (total size cap) now counts CAS blob sizes in the total. Previously only counted core+snapshot files, so CAS accumulation could push cache well over budget without triggering eviction.

completed_tasks.name: Regression tests — 68 tests across 3 files
completed_tasks.details: test_ris.py: SHA format tests, cold_start_ready/stale coverage, maybe_update_ris. test_cache_cli.py: CLI registration, status/clear commands via CliRunner. test_cache.py: ANALYZER_CACHE_VERSION tests, atomic CAS write, status/clear API. 1457 existing tests pass.

remaining_tasks.name: BUG-C1 — validate async write actually reduces latency
remaining_tasks.details: Need live E2E benchmarks: cold run time with keycloak/broadleaf before and after 1.32.5. Async background write (daemon thread + atexit join 5s) was added in 1.32.4. Verify no corruption and latency improvement. Requires running bash /private/tmp/sync_to_pipx.sh from normal Terminal first.

remaining_tasks.name: Live E2E test: sync workspace → pipx + verify all cache commands
remaining_tasks.details: Run bash /private/tmp/sync_to_pipx.sh, then: sourcecode cache status /private/tmp/spring-petclinic; sourcecode cache clear /private/tmp/keycloak --yes; sourcecode /private/tmp/keycloak --compact (cold); sourcecode /private/tmp/keycloak --compact (warm — should be < 0.5s); get_cold_start_context should return cold_start_ready after first run.

remaining_tasks.name: GAP 1 (easy): add upgrade_hint to require_feature() payload
remaining_tasks.details: license.py:244 — add 'upgrade_hint': 'sourcecode activate <license_key>' to payload dict in require_feature().

remaining_tasks.name: GAP 2 (medium): tiered --help output
remaining_tasks.details: Custom --help callback. Free shows lock labels, Pro shows full. is_pro unavailable at module init — must be lazy.

remaining_tasks.name: GAP 3 (medium): free-tier node cap for --graph-modules and --semantics
remaining_tasks.details: Max 10 nodes for free tier in --graph-modules and --semantics output.

human_actions_pending.action: Run bash /private/tmp/sync_to_pipx.sh from a normal Terminal (not Claude Code shell)
human_actions_pending.context: Claude Code shell has EPERM on workspace file renames. sync_to_pipx.sh uses cp to push workspace source to active pipx install.

human_actions_pending.action: Delete src/sourcecode/cache.tmp_new (leftover temp file from session 30)

human_actions_pending.context: Untracked since session 29. No action needed to unblock.

decisions.rationale: Package version changes on every release; analysis schema/logic changes rarely. Coupling them caused every patch bump to wipe all L1 cores (BUG-D2). ANALYZER_CACHE_VERSION starts at '1' and is bumped manually only when cache format or analysis output changes.

decisions.decision: short SHA used everywhere for RIS git_head comparison
decisions.rationale: cli.py already used rev-parse --short for cache key. RIS was using full SHA in _current_git_head, causing the comparison to always fail. Standardized on short SHA as the canonical format.

_preprocess_args extracts the first positional token as a repo path unless it's in _SUBCOMMANDS. 'cache' was not in the set, so sourcecode cache status would treat 'cache' as the target directory and fail. Added 'cache' to the frozenset.

next_action: Run bash /private/tmp/sync_to_pipx.sh then verify: sourcecode cache status, get_cold_start_context returns cold_start_ready, keycloak warm run < 0.5s.
context_notes: Session 31 fixed 6 bugs (BUG-R1, BUG-D1, BUG-D2, BUG-C4, BUG-C5) and bumped to 1.32.5. All changes committed in 2255711. 1457 tests pass. The one-time cache wipe on upgrade from 1.32.4 is expected — after that, ANALYZER_CACHE_VERSION='1' is stable. Workspace is 3 commits ahead of origin/master.
